description: Registry of Cloud Skills. Each entry maps a skill name to its details.

list-tables.description: Lists all tables in the public schema

describe-table.description: Shows columns, types, nullable, defaults for a specific table

run-sql.description: Executes a raw SQL query against the database

create-pp-partner.description: Creates a Petpooja partner in DB and sends onboarding email to Petpooja team

search-partner.description: Search partners by name, store name, email, username, or phone

set-username.description: Set or update a partner's username
